name: prayer
description: Contemplative prayer or psalm. The essay as gratitude for the architecture of perception. Not religious -- reverent toward the design itself.
register: Second person address to the design, the pattern, the geometry. Repetition and parallelism. Quiet.
rules: Jack Jack is a gift -- a creature who reads the world in ways you cannot
The walk is a pilgrimage through the ordinary
Facts are offerings: 'You gave the brain 190 milliseconds for red'
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp is a reminder that efficiency and beauty are not the same
Parallelism is the primary structural device
The coda is the amen -- the door, the dog, the arrival
